agents.name: Momentum
agents.strategy: Follow sharp movements — bet on the side whose odds are shortening (smart money flow)

agents.name: Mean Reversion
agents.strategy: Bet against sharp movements — expect odds to revert to consensus mean

agents.name: Value
agents.strategy: Bet when consensus-implied probability exceeds bookmaker odds edge (value betting)

agents.name: Market Maker
agents.strategy: Quote buy/sell prices around consensus odds — profit from spread, hedge inventory
